'''鈭歯g-j-y''' ('''ngajaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queep|queep]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queep|queep]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-j-y
|-
! Lemma
| ngajaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngajayithi|ngajayithi]] || [[word:ngajayiji|ngajayiji]] || [[word:ngajayishi|ngajayishi]] || [[word:ngajayi|ngajayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajayuthuth|ngajayuthuth]] || [[word:ngajayujuj|ngajayujuj]] || [[word:ngajayushush|ngajayushush]] || [[word:ngajay|ngajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajayuthu|ngajayuthu]] || [[word:ngajayuju|ngajayuju]] || [[word:ngajayushu|ngajayushu]] || [[word:ngajayu|ngajayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajayufuth|ngajayufuth]] || [[word:ngajayufuj|ngajayufuj]] || [[word:ngajayufush|ngajayufush]] || [[word:ngajayuf|ngajayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngajayethe|ngajayethe]] || [[word:ngajayeje|ngajayeje]] || [[word:ngajayeshe|ngajayeshe]] || [[word:ngajaye|ngajaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajayothoth|ngajayothoth]] || [[word:ngajayojoj|ngajayojoj]] || [[word:ngajayoshosh|ngajayoshosh]] || [[word:ngajay|ngajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajayotho|ngajayotho]] || [[word:ngajayojo|ngajayojo]] || [[word:ngajayosho|ngajayosho]] || [[word:ngajayo|ngajayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajayofoth|ngajayofoth]] || [[word:ngajayofoj|ngajayofoj]] || [[word:ngajayofosh|ngajayofosh]] || [[word:ngajayof|ngajayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngajay忙th忙|ngajay忙th忙]] || [[word:ngajay忙j忙|ngajay忙j忙]] || [[word:ngajay忙sh忙|ngajay忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngajay忙|ngajay忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajayathath|ngajayathath]] || [[word:ngajayajaj|ngajayajaj]] || [[word:ngajayashash|ngajayashash]] || [[word:ngajay|ngajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajayatha|ngajayatha]] || [[word:ngajayaja|ngajayaja]] || [[word:ngajayasha|ngajayasha]] || [[word:ngajaya|ngajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajayafath|ngajayafath]] || [[word:ngajayafaj|ngajayafaj]] || [[word:ngajayafash|ngajayafash]] || [[word:ngajayaf|ngajayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngajayasha|ngajayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongajayasha|gongajayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingajayasha|gokingajayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngajayn眉sha|ngajayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongajaynkn眉sha|gongajaynkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingajayn眉sha|gokingajayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngajaysh毛sha|ngajaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongajaynksh毛sha|gongajaynksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingajaysh毛sha|gokingajaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngajayrosha|ngajayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongajaynkrosha|gongajaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingajayrosha|gokingajayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngajaymusha|ngajaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongajaynkmusha|gongajaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingajaymusha|gokingajaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngajaysherasha|ngajaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongajaynksherasha|gongajaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingajaysherasha|gokingajaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngajayngasha|ngajayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongajaynkngasha|gongajaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingajayngasha|gokingajayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngajayyasha|ngajayyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongajaynkyasha|gongajaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingajayyasha|gokingajayyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngajayyamasha|ngajayyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongajaynkyamasha|gongajaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingajayyamasha|gokingajayyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngajayn眉sh毛sha|ngajayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongajaynkn眉sh毛sha|gongajaynkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingajayn眉sh毛sha|gokingajayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngajayn眉rosha|ngajayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongajaynkn眉rosha|gongajaynkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingajayn眉rosha|gokingajayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngajayn眉musha|ngajayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongajaynkn眉musha|gongajaynkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingajayn眉musha|gokingajayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngajaysh毛n眉sha|ngajaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongajaynksh毛n眉sha|gongajaynksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingajaysh毛n眉sha|gokingajaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngajaysh毛rosha|ngajaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongajaynksh毛rosha|gongajaynksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingajaysh毛rosha|gokingajaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngajaysh毛musha|ngajaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongajaynksh毛musha|gongajaynksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingajaysh毛musha|gokingajaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngajayron眉sha|ngajayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongajaynkron眉sha|gongajaynkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingajayron眉sha|gokingajayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngajayrosh毛sha|ngajayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongajaynkrosh毛sha|gongajaynkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingajayrosh毛sha|gokingajayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngajayromusha|ngajayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongajaynkromusha|gongajaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingajayromusha|gokingajayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngajaymun眉sha|ngajaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongajaynkmun眉sha|gongajaynkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingajaymun眉sha|gokingajaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngajaymush毛sha|ngajaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongajaynkmush毛sha|gongajaynkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingajaymush毛sha|gokingajaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngajaymurosha|ngajaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongajaynkmurosha|gongajaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingajaymurosha|gokingajaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngajay|ngajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙j忙y|ng忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongajay|hongajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙j忙y|hong忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongajay|hohongajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙j忙y|hohong忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngajay|n眉ngajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙j忙y|n眉ng忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngajay|n眉n眉ngajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙j忙y|n眉n眉ng忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngajay|n茂ngajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙j忙y|n茂ng忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngajay|n茂n茂ngajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙j忙y|n茂n茂ng忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungajay|lungajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙j忙y|lung忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungajay|lulungajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙j忙y|lulung忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingajay|lingajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙j忙y|ling忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingajay|lilingajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙j忙y|liling忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongajay|kongajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙j忙y|kong忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongajay|kokongajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙j忙y|kokong忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengajay|kengajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙j忙y|keng忙j忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengajay|kekengajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙j忙y|kekeng忙j忙y]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
